column280: Where I worked about 20 years ago the new manager wanted to have all black women at the front desk & wrote all of us up for things that never happened.  I was the 1st to quit, less than a month later the sweetest Puerto Rican lady in the world quit & the 2 other white ladies were gone in about another 6 mos.  Even the lady that had been our boss before the brought in the witch went to a different dept.  The last time I talked to her they can't keep people at the front desk because of that manager.

We were put under a different dept & manager.  I couldn't prove that she was racist but at least 90 0/0 of the people she hired were black, biracial or married to a black person.  Unless you were 1 of her pets she had lists of lies so she could get rid of you.  I was able to get Unemployment because of her.  A few years before that when she was made manager people left like rats leaving a sinking ship.  One lady I worked with was 1 of them.  They tried to make her apply for a job that she helped with sometimes & they got really MAD when she handed in her resignation.  She was leaving the hospital side & going over to the University side to be the secretary for a couple of the Dr's & the Nurse Practioners.
